CheckId: One or more node certificates expire within 90 days
CheckName: One or more node certificates expire within 90 days
Finding: Identity posture data indicates certificate on azl-iic-n01 expires within 90 days.
Remediation: Review certificate ownership and renew expiring node certificates before handoff.

CheckId: iDRAC firmware below recommended baseline on all nodes
CheckName: iDRAC firmware below recommended baseline on all nodes
Finding: OEM integration data shows iDRAC firmware at 7.10.30.00. The recommended baseline is 7.20 or later.
Remediation: Update iDRAC firmware via Dell OME or Lifecycle Controller during next maintenance window.

CheckId: Azure Policy assignments discovered at resource group scope
CheckName: Azure Policy assignments discovered at resource group scope
Finding: 2 policy assignments are enforcing tagging and security control auditing.
Remediation: Verify policy scope extends to arc resource group and monitor for compliance drift.

CheckId: Cluster event history includes a transient network quorum warning
CheckName: Cluster event history includes a transient network quorum warning
Finding: A Management network quorum warning event was recorded on 2026-04-06. Cluster recovered automatically.
Remediation: Review switch port configuration to confirm management NICs are on dedicated VLANs and bonded correctly.
